fleet-phantom.heading: Rolls-Royce Phantom Rental in Dubai: The Flagship Experience
fleet-phantom.quickAnswer: Rent the flagship Rolls-Royce Phantom in Dubai from AED 5,800/day, chauffeur-driven or self-drive, with free delivery across Dubai and 24/7 WhatsApp booking.
keyFacts: Rolls-Royce Phantom rental in Dubai starts at AED 5,800 per day; hourly hire is available from AED 800 (2-hour minimum), with discounted weekly and monthly rates.
The Phantom is the flagship of our fleet and can be booked chauffeur-driven or self-drive for qualifying renters, with free delivery across Dubai.
Free delivery covers Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, JBR, Business Bay, DIFC, Deira and Jumeirah, plus Abu Dhabi on request.
Book 24/7 via WhatsApp or phone +971 55 816 4922 or email info@rollsroycers.com; service is available in English, Arabic and Russian.
body: The Rolls-Royce Phantom is the flagship of the fleet and the definitive statement of arrival in Dubai. Our Rolls-Royce Phantom rental Dubai service starts from AED 5,800 per day and includes a professional chauffeur, so you simply step into the cabin and enjoy the ride. We offer free delivery across Dubai, from Downtown and DIFC to Palm Jumeirah and Business Bay.

Whether it is a wedding, a corporate event, a milestone celebration or a polished airport transfer from DXB or DWC, the Phantom carries an unmatched presence. Book your Rolls-Royce Phantom rental in Dubai 24/7 over WhatsApp with multilingual support, and our team will confirm your dates, route and delivery point in minutes.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to rent a Rolls-Royce Phantom in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Rolls-Royce Phantom rental in Dubai starts at AED 5,800 per day, including comprehensive insurance and VAT. Weekly and monthly rates are available on request, and a professional chauffeur can be added.

faqs.question: Is the Rolls-Royce Phantom available for rent in Dubai with a driver?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can rent the Phantom with a professional, multilingual chauffeur, or self-drive with a valid licence. Most clients choose the chauffeur option for weddings, corporate events and VIP transfers.

faqs.question: Can I rent a white Rolls-Royce Phantom for a wedding in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes, a white Phantom is one of our most requested wedding cars in Dubai. It can be arranged with floral decoration, ribbon and a chauffeur in formal attire, subject to availability.

faqs.question: Do you offer free delivery for Phantom rentals in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes, we deliver the Rolls-Royce Phantom free of charge to any location in Dubai, including hotels, residences and DXB airport. Just share your pickup point when booking on WhatsApp.

faqs.question: Can tourists rent a Rolls-Royce Phantom in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. Tourists can rent the Phantom with a valid passport, an international or home-country driving licence, and a credit card. A chauffeured booking removes the need for a UAE-recognised licence.
